productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Black Formal Shoe
description: With a sleek finish and fine construction, these handcrafted loafers from franco leone add an elegant finishing touch to a formal outfit. UpperLeather upper with round textures for absolute comfort and styleSlip-on style for ease of useConcealed elasticated gussets on the midfoot below the tongue to offer a snug, customised FitPointed toe design for absolute styleInner lining for sweat-free all-day comfortLeather footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with palm frond grooves on the forefoot for grip on smooth surfacesTPR raised heel textured at the back foot region for absolute ergonomic comfortshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
